name: Maple Nut Bisquit Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 12-cup fluted tube pan lightly.
3. In a medium saucepan, melt butter and stir in brown sugar, chopped walnuts, and maple-flavored syrup until combined.
4. Pour 1/4 cup of the sugar mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Cut the biscuit dough into 20 pieces and place them on edge, slightly overlapping, around the pan.
6. Pour the remaining sugar mixture over the biscuits.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 35 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Let cool for 3 minutes before inverting onto a serving plate.
Makes 1 Coffee Cake! Easy and Good!!
